caption: A man with light-colored hair, wearing a dark t-shirt, is seen in a picture-in-picture overlay against the backdrop of a "STORE" menu from a video game. He appears in the bottom-left corner of the screen, gesturing with his hands and speaking with an open-mouthed expression. The game interface features several digital player cards with "OVR" ratings of "90", "85+", and "84+". Above these cards are navigation tabs including "FEATURED", "ZERO CHILL", "SELECT OFFERS", "TRAINING", "SPECIAL OFFERS", and "GEAR - NEW". At the top of the screen, currency totals are displayed, including "172,729", "14,600", and "1,787,369". The store items below the cards include a "ZERO CHILL PLAYER" for "20,000", an "80+ OVR ZERO CHILL PLAYER" for "4,500", and an "84+ OVR ALL MADDEN PLAYER" for "2,800". Across the sequence, the game screen remains static while the man's facial expressions and hand movements change.
